title: alsinanthus lateriflorus
intro: Alsinanthus lateriflorus, also known as the lesser alder, is a flowering plant native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Alsinanthus lateriflorus include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Alsinanthus lateriflorus can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
